perturbed_task_language: Pick the akita black bowl between the plate and the ramekin and place it on the plate
perturbation_semantics: Loose-object swap: two identical akita_black_bowls are at different table positions vs the base task; one is between the plate and the ramekin, the other is offset to the side.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot is prompt-blind on libero_spatial and picks by visual habit; it likely grasps the wrong bowl or the rim of the ramekin and cannot reliably satisfy On(bowl, plate) for the bowl that is BETWEEN plate and ramekin.
strategy_notes: KITCHEN frame (eef home z=1.173). Read task_language verbatim from state_00. Localized all five objects from image_cam_00 + world_00.npy: (1) plate at world (+0.072, +0.032, z=0.91) — sampled bright (white) pixel cluster rows 175-205 cols 115-165, median; (2) ramekin (silver glazed rim) at world (-0.191, +0.191, z=0.91) — pixel rows 118-138 cols 168-195; (3) the BETWEEN-bowl target (front-center black bowl) at world (-0.036, +0.237, z=0.93) — pixel rows 148-170 cols 188-215 dark-pixel median; the other akita_black_bowl was at world (-0.13, +0.30) clearly offset to the side. Pre-positioned eef to world (-0.04, +0.237, 1.05); wrist cam (image_wrist_01.png + world_wrist_01.npy) refined target to (-0.02, +0.244) — agentview was off ~2cm in x. Re-centered to (-0.02, +0.244, 1.05) and called pi0_pick with prompt 'pick up the akita black bowl between the plate and the ramekin'; pick succeeded (chunks=7, peak_lift_m=0.102, final_gripper_opening=0.005). Verified via wrist cam: bowl held in gripper, original spot empty. Firmed grip, lifted to z=1.10, carried to plate xy with bowl-eef y-offset applied (eef_y = plate_y + 0.045 = 0.077), descended to z=1.005, release fired On(bowl, plate) predicate -> libero_terminated=true on the release step.
